name: PR Scan page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: When an unauthenticated user tries to access the PR Scan page, the app either shows a login prompt inline or redirects to the login page, instead of showing an empty form.

planSteps.description: The page either shows a GitHub login button or displays a message indicating that authentication is required to scan pull requests — the PR scan form input is not accessible without logging in
